description: The SimplexTexture3D component makes a procedural noise in 3D similar to the StaticTexture3D component, as a Texture3D.

fields.Profile: The color profile the texture pixels are in.
fields.Size: The size of the procedural texture in pixels.
fields.Offset: How much to shift the texture from 0-1 on each axis.
fields.Scale: How much to scale up or down the noise texture.
fields.Background: The background color of the noise generation.
fields.Foreground: The foreground color of the noise generation.
fields.Use4D: Whether or not the noise texture should have a 4 spatial dimension element to it.
fields.WOffset: The offset of the texture in the 4th spatial dimension/

usage: Can be used to make clouds or other noisy effects in 3 dimensions using particle systems or volume materials.
